title: Short title
doc_html:
SUBPART F-1. LOUISIANA GUARANTEED BENEFITS POOL

§1131. Short title

            This Subpart shall be known and may be cited as the "Louisiana Guaranteed Benefits Pool Act".

            Acts 2019, No. 412, §1, eff. June 11, 2019.
doc_text:
SUBPART F-1.  LOUISIANA GUARANTEED BENEFITS POOL
§1131.  Short title
This Subpart shall be known and may be cited as the "Louisiana Guaranteed Benefits
Pool Act".
Acts 2019, No. 412, §1, eff. June 11, 2019.
